_comment: Edit the entries array to update teaching, tutorials, workshops, service, and reviewing.

entries.title: Fondamenti di Automatica
entries.description: Teaching assistant for *Fondamenti di Automatica*, supporting a course on dynamical systems, stability, transfer functions, frequency-domain analysis, and feedback control.

entries.title: EECI PhD course: Neural Networks for Optimal Control
entries.description: Editable entry for PhD-level teaching activities on neural networks for optimal control.

entries.title: ETH DMPC summer course
entries.description: Editable entry for summer course activities on distributed model predictive control.

entries.title: ECC workshops co-organization
entries.description: Workshop on Distributed MPC for Multi-Agent Systems

entries.title: ECC workshops co-organization
entries.description: Workshop on Neural Network control with stability and performance guarantees

entries.title: Reviewing and academic service
entries.description: Served as reviewer for over 50 submissions to leading international control journals and conferences, including CDC, ECC, ACC, L-CSS, IEEE TAC, IEEE TCST, and Automatica.
